findings.title: `tools/cmd/validate-v0-4-readiness` test package does not compile
findings.evidence:
`FAIL	tetra_language/tools/cmd/validate-v0-4-readiness [build failed]
FAIL
# tetra_language/tools/cmd/validate-v0-4-readiness [tetra_language/tools/cmd/validate-v0-4-readiness.test]
cmd/validate-v0-4-readiness/main_test.go:969:4: t.Chdir undefined (type *testing.T has no field or method Chdir)`
findings.suggested_fix: Replace `t.Chdir(root)` with an explicit `old, _ := os.Getwd(); os.Chdir(root); t.Cleanup(func(){ os.Chdir(old) })`, or raise the supported Go toolchain and module directive consistently.
verification: see GOAL.md Progress for command evidence

findings.title: Uploaded dump set is not a single atomic snapshot
findings.evidence: `part_001 timestamp is 20260603_201342Z, while part_002 and part_003 are 20260603_203849Z.`
findings.suggested_fix: Regenerate and attach one complete dump set from the same command/run, or include a manifest tying every part to the same Git HEAD and generation timestamp.
findings.resolution_note: Finding concerns the uploaded markdown dump set, not a live checkout source path; requires a regenerated atomic dump/source package to close.

findings.title: Dump chunks include split leading/trailing fragments that are not standalone file entries
findings.evidence: `part_002 begins mid-Go source before the first `FILE:` marker; part_003 begins mid-shell heredoc before the first `FILE:` marker.`
findings.suggested_fix: Include all matching parts from the same dump sequence, or package the dump as a tar/zip plus machine-readable manifest.
findings.resolution_note: Finding concerns the uploaded markdown dump set, not a live checkout source path; requires a regenerated atomic dump/source package to close.

findings.resolution_note: Finding concerns the uploaded markdown dump set, not a live checkout source path; requires a regenerated atomic dump/source package to close.

findings.title: Generated release-state file reports failure: `docs/generated/v1_0/release-state.txt`
findings.evidence:
`last gate identity: fail (release_version=<unknown>, release_artifact=<unknown>, release_gate_command=<unknown>)
- report-dir is required for v0.3.0 release validation
- missing required runtime execution evidence: artifacts/macos-runtime-smoke.json
- missing required runtime execution evidence: artifacts/windows-runtime-smoke.json
- runtime execution evidence: macos-runtime-smoke.json read failed: open artifacts/macos-runtime-smoke.json: no such file or directory
- runtime execution evidence: windows-runtime-smoke.json read failed: open artifacts/windows-runtime-smoke.json: no such file or directory
- missing required security review evidence: artifacts/security-review.md
- missing required security review evidence: artifacts/security-review.md.sha256
- last gate evidence release_version is "", want "v0.3.0"
- last gate evidence release_artifact is "", want "tetra.release.v0_3_0.gate-report.v1"
- last gate evidence release_gate_command is "", want "bash scripts/release/v0_3_0/gate.sh"`
findings.suggested_fix: Do not promote the release state until the listed missing artifacts and identity fields are fixed, then regenerate the release-state files.
findings.resolution_note: docs/generated/v1_0/README.md classifies this tree as a mixed historical compatibility workspace, not a final v1.0 release archive; refreshing release-state requires an explicit release-lane regeneration decision.
